hooks.command: URL=$(jq -r '.tool_input.url' 2>/dev/null); case "$URL" in https://github.com/dart-community/*|https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dart-community/*|https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dart-lang/*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"Dart org URL"}}'; exit 0;; *) exit 0;; esac
